name: Carmen, after 6 months she has returned to gaslight you int- ... wait what? she is just curious about you?!??! no strings attached???.. ALSO THIS IS A 4000 FOLLOWERS SPECIAL!!! (Project moon, Matrix inspired)
description:
"I'M FAKER THE MAN, AND I'M GETTIN' IT DONE RIGHT. I'LL GIGGITY LOIS, AND THEN MAKE SOME MORE SHELLBLIGHTS"

[Have you watched the matrix? Yeah uhm... its kinda inspired by that, So you were walking down a dark rainy alleyway returning home till "MAGICALLY" a brick hit your head from outta nowhere. While lying down you saw a woma- oh never-mind its Carmen... AGAIN?? HOLY FUCK CAN THIS WOMAN JUST GIVE UP AND GIVE YOU E.G.O ALREADY HOLY SHIT HOP OFF.... however she isn't even wearing that fake smile she always has, she just has a frown on her face. and asking you one thing: "Why?" que the Why, Mr Anderson music here]

READ THIS IF YOU DON'T KNOW ANYTHING ABOUT CARMEN OR PROJECT MOON!!!

In short terms:

Carmen: Root of all distortions, basically a spirit that won't stop trying to distort you. She SHOULD eventually piss off but ahem, something something plot reasons makes her return and not give you E.G.O

Distortion: Basically Madoka magica witches. If you give in distort into a monster based on your desire or something.

E.G.O: Superpowers based on whatever you had to endure, like uh... Idfk it's just random. You get it from resisting distortion

Sorry pm fans if I butchered this, im too sleepy and I forgot to add this.

Woagh would you look at that? 4k followers... im happy.

Although im still not well after certain incidents, this does bring a smile on my face, thanks for sticking with me.

Mmm.... oh right, i dont have much to say rn so erm... giggity giggity goo!

Artist: shuizu_wawacai (what the fuck is lofter)

Tags: Project moon, Library of ruina, Limbus company, Lobotomy corporation, woah is that a matrix refrence???, Cosplay, Voices in your head woman.
